heading: Create a New Custom Error Handler
body:
This procedure walks you through how to create the new Function directly
in the **Create a Trigger** page.

You can also create the Function from the **Functions** page. For
more information on how to define Functions in Atlas, refer to
[write a function](atlas-define-a-function).

![The EventBridge custom error handling configuration in the UI.](/atlas-ui/images/triggers/eventbridge-custom-function.png)
